<!--
You can file any bug here, but if the issue is clearly in upstream AeroSpace
behavior (tiling, focus, multi-monitor, workspaces, config parsing, CLI),
filing at upstream helps the wider community:
-->

- **Bugs** → https://github.com/nikitabobko/AeroSpace/discussions/categories/potential-bugs
- **Feature ideas** → https://github.com/nikitabobko/AeroSpace/discussions/categories/feature-ideas
- **Questions** → https://github.com/nikitabobko/AeroSpace/discussions/categories/questions-and-answers

If you're unsure whether your issue is fork-specific or upstream, replace the
template below with your details and file it here — I'll re-route if needed.
